title: Section 11B
content: 1[11B. Power of Central Government to make rules for regulating atomic minerals specified under Part B of First Schedule.--The Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, make rules for regulating the grant of mining leases or other mineral concessions in respect of minerals specified in Part B of the First Schedule and for purposes connected therewith, and the State Government shall grant a 2[mineral concession] in respect of any such mineral in accordance with such rules.]
footnote: 1. Ins. by Act 10 of 2015, s. 12 (w.e.f. 12-1-2015). 2. Subs. by Act 16 of 2021, s. 2, "reconnaissance permit, prospecting licence or mining lease" (w.e.f. 28-3-2021).
